# Native Fragments

> Native Fragments is a zero-dependency, zero-build frontend framework that helps agents create fast, maintainable, AI-friendly web applications.

## Primary Docs

- [Technical documentation](https://docs.nativefragments.org/llms.txt)
- [Getting started](https://docs.nativefragments.org/getting-started.md)
- [API reference](https://docs.nativefragments.org/reference.md)
- [API routes](https://docs.nativefragments.org/api-routes.md)
- [Workers](https://docs.nativefragments.org/workers.md)
- [Signals](https://docs.nativefragments.org/signals.md)

## Product Pages

- [Landing page](https://nativefragments.org/)
- [Examples](https://nativefragments.org/examples)
- [Demos](https://nativefragments.org/demos)
- [Manifesto](https://nativefragments.org/manifesto)

## Package

- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nativefragments/core)
- [signals npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nativefragments/signals)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/somedudeokay/nativefragments)
